name: frontend-workflow
description: Generic frontend engineering skills for planning work before code, reviewing RTK Query changes, auditing affordance regressions, and safely finalizing pull requests across React and TypeScript web applications.

interface.longDescription: Generic frontend workflow skills for repository-aware planning before code, RTK Query cache and contract review, affordance and hidden-regression audits, and safe pull request finalization.
defaultPrompt: Plan this frontend feature before we code it.
Review this RTK Query change for cache, invalidation, and race issues.
Check this UI refactor for affordance and hidden form regressions.
Finalize this frontend PR and prepare a clean Summary and Test plan.
